svg.text: Picks next URL from highest-priority host that is not rate-limited

g.text: Non-blocking HEAD + GET, no thread waits on network
Thread picks next ready host immediately when one finishes
New URLs routed to their host queue instantly
Only network I/O: writing cleaned pages

svg.text: No rounds, no idle workers, no frontier capping needed
High-PR domains get crawled first; low-PR sites get whatever time is left
